questions.question: What does precision measure?
options: How close to the true value
How exact and consistent the measurement is
How hard to use the tool
questions.explanation: Precision = exactness and consistency. More decimal places = more precise.

questions.question: You can be precise but not accurate.
questions.explanation: True! A broken clock that's always 10 minutes fast is precise (consistent) but inaccurate (always wrong).

questions.question: 65.347 kg vs 65 kg. Which is more precise?
questions.explanation: 65.347 kg has more decimal places = more precise.
